title: twoTreeD_Rails
description: Simple 3D rails. Resource pack make Minecraft rails to be 3D.
body:
# T~~w~~o 3D_rails
### About:
This resource pack transforms your default 2D sprite rails into detailed 3D models while preserving the classic Vanilla texture. As shown in the images, rails now have a more realistic look with added depth and structure, enhancing your Minecraft experience without changing the original style.

### Page description:
- About
- Screenshots
- Installation guide
- End

## Screenshots:
![This is a reference of texture pack, showing how they gonna look in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa4aed73497ad32b2393b632e24d84a9d41c5f9f_0.webp)
![Reference of texture pack, with and without](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2d7b55f9fcd2535f6054f38bd07cf03cbc673e1_0.webp)

## Installation:
1. Launch your version of minecraft / (or while playing press "Esc" button)
2. Click on "Option" menu.
3. Click on "Resource pack"
   
   _This is list of all your pack, left column that is not in use - right column that is currently used_
4. Click on "Open Pack Folder"
5. Drag the resource pack into the explorer window that just appeared.
6. Go back to Minecraft. (In left column will appear new resource pack)
7. Move resource pack to the right column and click "Done"
8. Enjoy

## End:
Thank you for downloading my resource pack, I will be happy to hear your feedback or/and any suggestion or issue that might be found.
Thanks, there are a lot of 2D sprites in Minecraft that I would like to change!
